objective: To extract a complete forensic-level structured system state from the conversation and represent it as a precise JSON for execution continuity within AI Growth OS.
decisions: Adopt dual-mode system: FORENSIC EXTRACTION MODE and EXECUTION MODE
Use strict JSON schema for system state representation
Do not redesign existing system components
Focus on stabilization instead of rebuilding
Track system using phase-based architecture (Phase 6.x stabilization)
Use matrix-based system visibility (V2 zero-gap system)
Separate completed, partial, and designed_not_executed states
Enforce no assumptions and traceability to chat
Maintain execution continuity using structured state
inputs: User requests for debugging and full replaceable code
User confirmation of partial system functionality
User request for deep phase state analysis
User request for zero-gap system matrix
User request for forensic JSON extraction
notes: System is operational at core execution level but lacks authentication, orchestration, DevOps, deployment, and security layers. Multiple modules are designed but not implemented. Current focus is stabilization and full system visibility through structured extraction.
